rows.answer_body: Based on these records, this archive is a source-linked research archive for graphic design and visual communication records. It organizes records through folders/topology: Unresolved region, Midcentury modern graphic communication, Trade card, Research lab method, India, Graphic design object record. Surface types in the packet: sheet, method. Publication roles in the packet: support_packet_appendix_text, method_context, main_sheet. Source families represented: Library of Congress loc. gov API, browser-local-rag-lab method files. Rights states represented: rights_review_required, research_fixture, thumbnail_candidate. Image-state codes represented: IMG04, IMG00, IMG01.
